steps.title: Recognize the repeated expression
steps.content:
The expression $2x+9$ appears on both sides. Substitute $u = 2x+9$ to simplify:
$$5u = 3u + 74$$

steps.title: Solve for the substituted variable
steps.content:
Subtract $3u$ from both sides:
$$5u - 3u = 74$$
$$2u = 74$$
$$u = 37$$
Since $u = 2x+9$, we have $2x+9 = 37$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
